text_forecast.outlook: North and northeast 13-20 m/s, but 15-28 m/s in Öræfi until midnight. Light snow or sleet showers in the northwest, but snow, sleet or rain in the eastern half. Northeast and east 5-13 tomorrow morning but north 13-20 in the northwest until tomorrow evening. Snow, sleet or rain in the northern half, but showers of rain or sleet in the south. Temperatures 0 to 8 °C, warmest in the south.

multi_day.forecast: Variable 5-13 m/s. Widely some intermittent rain or sleet. Less precipitation in the afternoon. Temperature 0 to 8 degrees C, warmest in the south part of the country.

Southeasterly or variable wind 3-10 and mostly dry, but rain or sleet in the southeastern part. Increasing wind and precipitation there in the evening. Temperature at or above freezing point in the north, but 2 to 8 degrees in the south.
Northeast and east 8-15 with rain or sleet, especially in the southeastern part, but mainly dry in the northwest. Temperature 2 to 10 degrees C.
East 5-10. Intermittent rain in the south but partly fair in the north. Temperature 1 to 7 degrees C.
Light southerly wind, some rainshowers in the south and west but partly cloudy elsewhere. Temperature 2 to 10 degrees C.

alerts.headline: NE severe gale og storm in Öræfi
alerts.description: Northeast severe gale or storm  with sustained wind speed 18-28 m/s in Öræfi area (Skaftafell). Strong wind gusts expected near mountains which locally may exceed 40 m/s. Hazardous for vehicles The weather is likely to cause transport disturbances, and travelers should plan accordingly. People are advised to secure their neighborhood and show caution.

alerts.headline: Mod. to heavy snow in mountains.
alerts.description: Moderate or severe snowfall expected with poor visibility in mountains but rain in lowlands. Some transport disturbances anticipated. People are advised to show caution and monitor weather forecasts.
